'''Korta Sarc''' was a [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] [[Alpha Premier]] who lived during the of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. Sometime by [[8 BBY/Legends|8 BBY]], Sarc suddenly disappeared and the [[Uvena System Constabulary]] assigned two [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] scouts, [[Lak Sivrak/Legends|Lak Sivrak]] and [[Yurdak Fav]], to join the search. Sarc's was eventually found [[Death/Legends|murdered]] inside the [[Jenet/Legends|Jenet]] embassy.<ref name="AIR" />
